G

getAllByGymId(Integer) - Method in class org.sii.Services.MembershipService
Retrieves all membership plans offered by a specific gym.
getGymById(Integer) - Method in class org.sii.Services.GymService
Retrieves detailed information for a specific gym facility.
getGyms() - Method in class org.sii.Services.GymService
Retrieves all registered gyms in the system.
getMemberById(Integer) - Method in class org.sii.Services.MemberService
Finds a member by their unique identifier.
getMembers() - Method in class org.sii.Services.MemberService
Retrieves all members from the system.
getMembershipById(Integer) - Method in class org.sii.Services.MembershipService
Retrieves a specific membership plan by its ID.
getMemberships() - Method in class org.sii.Services.MembershipService
Retrieves all membership plans available in the system.
getRevenue() - Method in class org.sii.Services.GymService
Generates a global revenue report by iterating through all membership plans.
GymService - Class in org.sii.Services
Service layer responsible for handling business logic related to Gym facilities.
